app.rebuilt_logout: App was updated, please sign in again.

donation.mkIntro:
MediaKeeper was born from a wish to simplify managing a media library: combining simplicity with complete management, while adding features you won't find anywhere else, like the achievements system. I use it every day and I don't plan to stop — whether for new features, stability or security.

This project takes a lot of my time. If you'd like to support it, feel free to join the discussions, report issues and share your suggestions, or simply tell the people around you about the app.
donation.mkThanks: Thank you all for your trust!
donation.kofi: Buy me a coffee on Ko-fi
donation.sponsor: Buy me a coffee on GitHub Sponsors
donation.starSub: Free — it helps spread the word

encryptionKey.title: Encryption key is ephemeral
encryptionKey.text: MediaKeeper is running on an in-memory key. Every secret saved now will be unreadable after a container restart. Set MEDIAKEEPER_ENCRYPTION_KEY (or mount /data/.encryption_key) and restart the service.

mediaManager.title: Media Manager
mediaManager.allCategoriesTitle: Show all files from all categories
mediaManager.categoryPathHint: The path must match a volume mounted in Docker Compose.
mediaManager.extractSubfoldersTitle: Extract files from selected subfolders to the current folder
mediaManager.suggestedMatchHint: Exact match of source parent folder
mediaManager.formatSyntaxHint: {n} series name · {t} episode title · {y} year · {s00e00} S01E01 · {sxe} 1x01 · {subt} audio
mediaManager.profilesDesc: Save your configuration as a reusable profile.
mediaManager.anomalyDesc: Criteria used when analyzing file names.
mediaManager.ruleYearHint: Year for movies, episode number for series
mediaManager.langDesc: Language used for titles and episode names when renaming.
mediaManager.advProfilesDesc: Complete configurations. Click to apply instantly.
mediaManager.customRulesDesc: Create custom replacement rules that are automatically applied to each generated name. Useful for removing unwanted words, fixing formats, or normalizing naming. Each rule replaces a text (or regex) with another in the filename.
mediaManager.exportDesc: Export the rename list for auditing or external validation.
mediaManager.expectedColumns: Expected columns: Old name, New name, Extension
mediaManager.dragCsv: Drag a CSV here or browse
mediaManager.crossCatDesc: Check if generated names already exist in other categories.
mediaManager.checkPermissions: Check permissions, disk space or invalid characters.
mediaManager.renameErrorsTitle: Rename errors — {count} file failed | Rename errors — {count} files failed
mediaManager.releaseTagsDesc: List of words stripped from the filename before the automatic TMDB search. Includes the built-in defaults (grey) and your custom entries (accent color). You can remove any word — for instance "DVD" if one of your movies is literally titled "The DVD Story". Case-insensitive.
mediaManager.releaseTagsEmpty: Empty list — no word will be stripped from the filename.
mediaManager.releaseTagsResetConfirm: Reset the list to the built-in tags? Your custom additions will be lost.
mediaManager.filesAlreadyExist: {count} file(s) already exist in the destination folder:

settings.title: Settings
settings.sourceMediaDesc: Only one active source at a time. Powers the dashboard and statistics.
settings.externalApisDesc: API keys for third-party services (metadata, subtitles...).
settings.appearanceDesc: Customize the accent color and visual settings.
settings.radiusDesc: Adjust the corner radius of cards, buttons and inputs.
settings.bgDesc: Drag an image or click to choose. It will be applied as a semi-transparent background.
settings.bgUpload: Drag an image here or click to choose
settings.particlesDesc: Show animated particles on the login page and dashboard.
settings.glowDesc: Adjust the brightness of the accent halo around pill buttons (0 = off, 200 % = very bright).
settings.resetOnboardingConfirm: Re-run the wizard? The page will reload.

network.title: Network settings
network.desc: Enable optional caches to cut bandwidth and speed up page loads.

imageCache.label: Image cache
imageCache.desc: Downloads and stores TMDB posters on the local disk. Subsequent requests are served without contacting TMDB.

dnsCache.label: DNS cache
dnsCache.desc: Keeps DNS resolutions in memory for a configurable time. Useful for bare-metal deployments without a system DNS cache.

security.needIpOrUser: Enter at least an IP or a username.

settings.testToastDesc: Send a test notification to preview the rendering.
settings.testToastMsgMedia: New movie added to the library
settings.testWizardDesc: Preview or re-run the installation wizard.

scheduler.title: Scheduler
scheduler.watchlist_check: Checks for missing episodes and updates the watchlist.
scheduler.log_rotation: Log rotation and Emby log collection.
scheduler.duplicates: Detects duplicate files in the Emby media library.
scheduler.library_scan: Runs a full scan of the Emby media library.
scheduler.emby_recent_scan: Indexes the latest items added to Emby so their availability shows within minutes.
scheduler.emby_full_scan: Reconciles the whole Emby/TMDB availability index (detects removals, fills missing matches).
scheduler.backup: Creates an automatic backup based on configured components.
scheduler.healthcheck: Analyzes media file health (codecs, resolution, subtitles…).
scheduler.subtitle_auto: Automatically downloads subtitles for new media based on the default profile.
scheduler.expire_users: Automatically disables accounts (Emby + MediaKeeper) whose access window has expired.
scheduler.cleanup_available_requests: Automatically clears available requests after the configured grace period.
scheduler.gdpr_purge: Permanently removes user accounts marked for GDPR purge.
scheduler.quota_auto_recompute: Nightly recompute of automatic request quotas from each user's recent activity.
scheduler.clear_image_cache: Automatically clears the on-disk image cache (manual purge also available from the cache row).

cache.title: Cache
cache.desc: MediaKeeper caches external API requests to reduce calls and speed up the UI.

onboarding.subtitle: Set up your personal media space
onboarding.welcomeDesc: This wizard will help you configure your instance in just a few minutes. You can change all these settings at any time in Settings.
onboarding.embyDesc: MediaKeeper connects to your Emby server to retrieve statistics, sessions and libraries.
onboarding.embyKeyHelp: How to get an API key
onboarding.tmdbDesc: TMDB is used to retrieve metadata (posters, descriptions, seasons) when renaming files.
onboarding.foldersDesc: Enter the paths to your media folders inside the Docker container. These paths must match your mounted volumes.
onboarding.foldersHint: Leave empty to use default values or environment variables.
onboarding.foldersOptional: Optional: you can configure your folders anytime in Settings → Folders.
onboarding.tourDesc: Here is a quick overview of what you can do with MediaKeeper.
onboarding.doneDesc: MediaKeeper is ready. You can refine the configuration at any time in Settings.
onboarding.testFail: ✗ Connection failed — check URL and API key
onboarding.modPortal: Media requests, screenings, profile, achievements and more
onboarding.opensubsDesc: OpenSubtitles allows you to automatically search and download subtitles for your movies and series.

backup.desc: Back up and restore your MediaKeeper configuration.
backup.pgDumpHint: Requires pg_dump in the container. Large file.
backup.restoreConfirm: Restore this backup? Current data will be overwritten.
backup.destinationDesc: Directory where backup files are stored.
backup.dirLocked: The backup directory is locked by the BACKUP_PATH configuration.
backup.dirLockedNotice: The backup directory is set by the BACKUP_PATH environment variable and can't be changed here. Edit your compose configuration to change it.
backup.retentionDesc: Set the retention period or maximum number of backups.

healthCheck.title: Media Health
healthCheck.noScanYet: No health scan has been run yet. Click the button to analyze your libraries.

config.intro: Define the detection rules for issues in your libraries. Enable or disable each check, and adjust thresholds to match your quality standards. Changes will take effect on the next scan.

explanations.obsolete_container: Detects files in legacy formats (AVI, WMV, FLV…) that offer worse compression and compatibility than modern containers like MKV or MP4.
explanations.obsolete_codec: Flags files encoded with outdated codecs (MPEG2, DivX, WMV…). These codecs produce larger files at lower quality compared to H.264 or H.265.
explanations.low_resolution: Identifies files whose vertical resolution is below the chosen threshold. Useful for spotting low-quality copies in your library.
explanations.low_bitrate: Spots files with abnormally low video bitrate, which may indicate excessive compression or poor encoding quality.
explanations.no_audio: Alerts on files that contain no audio track. This usually indicates a corrupted file or a download issue.
explanations.large_file: Flags files exceeding the configured size threshold. Helps identify files taking up disproportionate disk space.
explanations.hdr_no_sdr: Detects HDR files that lack an SDR alternative version. These files may display incorrectly on non-HDR screens.

subtitles.title: Subtitles
subtitles.searchHint: Search by title. Then select the matching result to view available subtitles.
subtitles.notConfigured: OpenSubtitles is not configured. Add your API key in Settings.
subtitles.compareWarning: Comparing downloads both files and uses 2 from your quota.
subtitles.desyncWarning: Subtitle may be out of sync
subtitles.removeStreamConfirm: Remove {stream} from file? This modifies the file (ffmpeg remux).

subtitles.streamSearchHint: Search audio and subtitle tracks in your library. E.g. VFQ, VFF, commentary, forced, AC3…
subtitles.batchRemoveConfirm: Remove {count} track(s)? This modifies the files (ffmpeg remux).

confirms.delete: Soft-delete {name}? Data stays available via the « Show deleted » filter.
confirms.deactivate: Deactivate {name}? They will no longer be able to log into MediaKeeper.
confirms.deactivateEmby: Disable Emby access for {name}? Active streaming sessions will be logged out immediately.

toasts.embyIdsSynced: {updated} account(s) linked to Emby, {already} already up-to-date, {unmatched} unmatched

errors.no_emby_link: This user has no known Emby id. Ask them to log in once.
errors.no_emby_id: Missing Emby id for this user.
errors.user_not_found: User not found on Emby (was the account deleted?).
errors.no_policy: The Emby API key lacks admin rights — cannot modify this account's policy.
errors.network: Could not reach the Emby server (network).
errors.http_400: Emby rejected the request (400). Check the server configuration.
errors.http_401: Invalid or expired Emby API key (401).
errors.http_403: Emby API key missing admin rights (403). Use an admin key.
errors.http_500: Emby internal error (500). Try again later.
errors.self_action_forbidden: You cannot perform this action on your own account.
errors.not_local: This account is not a local one — Emby owns its password.

drawer.loadError: Failed to load this account. Close the panel and try again.

identity.emailHelp: Used as the recipient address for email notifications (expiry reminders, password reset, etc.) once the Notifications module is enabled.
identity.displayNameResetHelp: On their next portal visit, the user will be forced to pick a new display name via the first-login overlay.
identity.displayNameResetConfirm: Force {name} to pick a new display name on their next portal visit?
identity.displayNameResetPending: Reset pending — overlay will trigger on next login.

access.roleHelp: The role applies a preset of permissions. You can fine-tune them below.
access.accountActiveHelp: When off, the user can no longer log in to MK and disappears from leaderboards.
access.embyEnabledHelp: Turning this off will block streaming and log out active sessions.
access.deleteHelp: Deletion is soft: the row stays in DB and can be restored via the « Show deleted » filter.
access.deleteBullet1: The account can no longer log into MediaKeeper.
access.deleteBullet2: Requests, lists, problems and trophies are preserved (still attributed to the account).
access.deleteBullet3: The Emby account is NOT touched — use « Disable Emby » above to block streaming.
access.restoreHelp: This account has been deleted. Restoring it re-enables MediaKeeper access.

quota.modeHelp: Manual: you set the monthly allowance. Automatic: it adjusts with the user's activity, within the bounds below.
quota.unlimitedHelp: No monthly cap on requests for this user.
quota.autoApproveHelp: Requests from this user are approved automatically (no moderation).

security.exportHelp: Downloads every record we keep on this user (profile + counts).
security.notifyHelp: Pushes a targeted notification to the user's bell.
security.sessionsHelp: Invalidates this user's MediaKeeper tokens. They will need to sign back into MediaKeeper. Emby sessions are not affected.
security.forceLogoutScope: This action does not log the user out of Emby. To cut streaming, use « Disable Emby » in the Access & Role tab.
security.forceLogoutConfirm: Force MediaKeeper logout for {name}? Every MediaKeeper session will be invalidated immediately (Emby sessions stay active).
security.passwordResetHelp: Generates a new random password for this local account. Hand it over once — the user must change it on next sign-in.
security.passwordResetConfirm: Generate a new password for {name}? The old one will be revoked immediately.
security.loginHistoryEmpty: No recorded login for this account.

notes.notesHelp: These notes are never shown to the user.
notes.tagsHelp: Free-form tags for triage (VIP, troublesome, beta…).

audit.empty: No recorded action for this account.

drawerEmby.title: Import from Emby
drawerEmby.subtitle: Pick the users to provision. Others will not be able to log in.

achievements.marathoner_desc: Watch 8+ hours in a single day

identity.avatarHint: JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF. 5 MB max.
identity.avatarOverride: This avatar overrides the Emby one.
identity.usernameHint: Visible publicly. Editable once every 6 months.
identity.usernameImposedHint: Provisional username. You can change it now without waiting.
identity.adminPreviewBanner: Admin preview — your profile is not visible to other users.

visibility.publicHint: Visible in the leaderboard and viewable by other users.

account.passwordHint: Your password is managed by Emby. MediaKeeper sign-in uses the same credentials.

forceUsername.publicNotice: Choose carefully — this username is shown publicly to every other member (global leaderboard, cinema room, comments).

data.exportLimited: Export is limited to once per hour, try again later.
data.exportLimitedAt: Export is limited to once per hour, try again at {when}.
data.exportTooLarge: Your data exceeds the maximum export size, contact your administrator.

privacy.embyNotice: Your MediaKeeper account is linked to Emby. Deleting it here does not affect your Emby account.

deleteModal.title: Delete your account?
deleteModal.warning: This schedules the permanent deletion of your MediaKeeper account and all associated data. You can cancel the request during the grace period shown on the portal banner.
deleteModal.scheduled: Deletion scheduled. You can still cancel it from the portal banner.
deleteModal.failed: Could not submit the request. Try again.

admin.title: Requests configuration

debug.title: Debug tools
debug.hint: Acts on the selected account immediately. Everything is logged.
debug.noUserSelected: Pick a user to enable the actions.
debug.xpHint: Positive value adds XP, negative removes it (total can never drop below zero).
debug.levelHint: Forces the level and aligns XP to the minimum required.
debug.achievementHint: Filter, then unlock or reset a trophy.
debug.recheckHint: Recomputes every active user's trophies from their watch history. Idempotent — no duplicate XP.
debug.recheckResult: {users} users processed · {updated} with new trophy · {unlocks} total unlocks
debug.resetForAllHint: Removes this trophy from every user and refunds the matching XP. Pair with "Recheck all trophies" to re-award it cleanly after a bug fix.
debug.resetForAllConfirm: Confirm resetting "{ach}" for ALL users? Matching XP will be refunded.
debug.resetForAllResult: {ach} · {ua} trophies removed · {xp} XP entries removed · {profiles} profiles recomputed

admin.searchTmdb: Search a movie or series on TMDB...

featured.desc: Showcase a title from your Emby library on the portal's home banner. When several entries are set, one is picked at random.

req.title: Requests
req.subtitle: Approve, reject and monitor member requests
req.rejectReasonPlaceholder: E.g. Already available, rights unavailable, duplicate…
req.rejectReasonHint: Optional — empty means rejected without a stated reason.

anonymizeRequests.title: Anonymize requests
anonymizeRequests.desc: When enabled, the username of whoever filed a request is hidden from other users. Only the request date remains visible. Admins still see who requested what for moderation.

allowAdultRequests.title: Allow adult content requests
allowAdultRequests.desc: When off, users cannot request pornographic titles even after disabling "hide adult content" in their preferences. Turn on to let them request adult content.

heroTrendCount.title: Hero trend count
heroTrendCount.desc: Total number of items shown in the home hero banner (TMDB trending + manually featured). Featuring a movie takes one trending slot. Set to 0 to hide the hero entirely.

requestsCleanup.title: Auto-cleanup of available requests
requestsCleanup.desc: Automatically deletes requests in the "Available" status after this many days. 0 = disabled.

eventCapacityMin.title: Minimum event capacity
eventCapacityMin.desc: Smallest value event creators can pick when starting a new event (steps of 5).

eventCapacityMax.title: Maximum event capacity
eventCapacityMax.desc: Largest value event creators can pick when starting a new event (steps of 5).

defaultLanguage.title: Default portal language
defaultLanguage.desc: Default language for new users until they choose their own; Auto follows the server default.

maintenance.title: Maintenance mode
maintenance.desc: When on, the entire portal navigation redirects to a customizable holding page. Admins keep full access.

donation.title: Donation button
donation.desc: Shows a heart in the portal with your donation link and message. Your users only see what you configure here; the MediaKeeper support section stays admin-only. Has no effect until a link is set.

gdpr.title: Privacy mode
gdpr.intro: Enable the user-facing data-protection surfaces. Off by default: nothing changes until you flip the switch.
gdpr.privacyLangHint: The editor shows the locale currently selected. Switch the interface language top-right to edit the other version.

toggle.title: Enable privacy mode
toggle.desc: When on, users see a Privacy tab with export and account deletion. When off, no user-facing surface is exposed.

privacyFr.title: Privacy policy — French
privacyFr.desc: HTML rendered to users. Content runs through the security sanitiser on save.

privacyEn.title: Privacy policy — English
privacyEn.desc: English version displayed to users whose language is en.

dpo.title: Data contact
dpo.desc: Email or label shown to users as a contact point. Leave empty to hide it.

delay.title: Grace period before final deletion (days)
delay.desc: Window during which a user can cancel a deletion request before the account is purged.
delay.invalid: Invalid value. Accepted range: {min} to {max} days.

pending.title: Accounts pending deletion
pending.desc: Users who requested account deletion. You can cancel the request from each row.

xpEvents.hint: Scheduled XP multipliers (Christmas, Halloween, special weekends…). Overlapping events multiply together.
xpEvents.name: Name
xpEvents.empty: No XP events. Create one to boost player XP.

detail.noOverview: No synopsis available for this title.
detail.noExtras: No extras or reviews for this title.
